name: Whole Grain Chippers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Lightly grease cookie sheets or line with parchment paper.
3. Cream butter and sugars in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in baking soda, vanilla extract, and salt.
5. Blend in flours and oats to make a stiff dough.
6. Stir in chocolate chips.
7. Shape rounded teaspoonsfuls of dough into balls, rolling them in sunflower seeds.
8. Place the shaped chippers about 2 inches apart on prepared cookie sheets.
9. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until firm. Do not overbake.
10. Allow to cool a few minutes on the cookie sheet, then transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
11. Makes about 6 dozen cookies.
Favorite All Time Recipes: Chocolate Lover's Cookies and Brownies.
